publications.title: The European Commission publishes its AI Continent Action Plan

publications.title: EU AI Act: obligations for high-risk AI systems
publications.summary: A&O Shearman explains provider and deployer obligations for high-risk AI systems under the EU AI Act ahead of the 2 August 2026 application date.

publications.title: EU AI Act: limited-risk AI compliance requirements
publications.summary: A&O Shearman maps Article 50 transparency duties for chatbots, synthetic content and deepfakes under the EU AI Act.
